0–100 score per student · factors: CP level + iReady placement + score trajectory + Opp1→Opp2 change

Grade

Category
Score formula: CP Level (base 18–88) iReady MOY (±3 to ±10) Score Trend (±3 to ±10) Opp1→2 Change (±5) · Border students (35–55) = highest-leverage intervention targets
Predicted Pass Rate by Grade
Score Distribution
⚡ Border Students — Closest to Passing
Approaching students with readiness 35–55 — sorted closest to threshold first. A focused push could move them to On Track or Likely to Pass.
